label: Strong AI/backend resume
resume_hint: AI + backend projects with FastAPI, retrieval, prompts, evaluation, and deployment signals.

difficulty_mode_expectation.basic: Uses simpler wording and no more than one follow-up on the same topic.
difficulty_mode_expectation.medium: Keeps a balanced practical round without tiny warm-up filler.
difficulty_mode_expectation.difficult: Introduces ownership, technical depth, or problem solving by turn 4.
